introSection: Cosmic Typhoon is a steel roller coaster built by manufacturer Interpark currently located at Milky Way Adventure Park in Bideford, Devon, England, UK. It was built in 2007, opened on the 7th of July and is still operating.

sections.title: Colour Scheme
sections.content: The track was originally painted blue. In 2017, it was repainted orange. The supports are unpainted, just bare metal.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content:
This ride runs 6 cars. Riders are arranged in 2 rows of 2 for a total capacity of 4 riders per car. The type of restraints used is a single lapbar for each pair of riders.

The cars are loosely stylised around planes and each car features a different main colour.

fullText:
Cosmic Typhoon is a steel roller coaster built by manufacturer Interpark currently located at Milky Way Adventure Park in Bideford, Devon, England, UK. It was built in 2007, opened on the 7th of July and is still operating.



The track was originally painted blue. In 2017, it was repainted orange. The supports are unpainted, just bare metal.

This ride runs 6 cars. Riders are arranged in 2 rows of 2 for a total capacity of 4 riders per car. The type of restraints used is a single lapbar for each pair of riders.

The cars are loosely stylised around planes and each car features a different main colour.
